title: Add message timestamps and reply button to conversation view

requirements.summary: Display a timestamp on every message bubble in ConversationView showing when the message was sent or received
acceptanceCriteria: Every message bubble in ConversationView displays a timestamp below it
Timestamps show time only (e.g., '2:45 PM') for messages sent today
Timestamps show day and time (e.g., 'Mon 2:45 PM') for messages older than today
Timestamps are visually subtle (muted/small text) and do not overwhelm the message content
Both sent and received messages show timestamps

file_operations.description: Add timestamp rendering below each message bubble. Create a utility function to format the timestamp field (bigint nanoseconds) into human-readable format: show time only (e.g., '2:45 PM') for messages sent today, or day and time (e.g., 'Mon 2:45 PM') for older messages. Style timestamps with muted/small text to keep them visually subtle. Apply formatting to both sent and received message bubbles.

requirements.summary: Add a Reply button to every message bubble in ConversationView
acceptanceCriteria: Every message bubble in ConversationView has a Reply button visible on hover or as a persistent icon
Clicking Reply populates the message input with a quoted reference to the original message content
The message input is focused automatically after clicking Reply
A visual indicator (e.g., a reply-to banner above the input) shows which message is being replied to, with an option to cancel the reply
The reply context is cleared after the reply message is sent

file_operations.description: Add a Reply button to each message bubble, shown on hover or as a persistent icon. Implement click handler that captures the message content and stores it in local state as the reply context. Prepend quoted text (e.g., '> [original message]\n') to the message input field. Auto-focus the input field after setting the reply context. Add a reply-to banner UI above the input showing the quoted message with a cancel/close button to clear the context. Modify the send message handler to clear the reply context after successfully sending the reply.

requirements.summary: Ensure the message data model used in ConversationView exposes a timestamp field from the backend
acceptanceCriteria: The Message type in the backend includes a timestamp field (Int or Time)
The timestamp is returned in the conversation query results
The frontend ConversationView receives and renders the timestamp for each message

file_operations.description: Verify that the Message type received from backend includes the timestamp field (bigint nanoseconds as shown in backend.d.ts). Confirm that the timestamp is accessible in the message data passed to ConversationView from the useGetMessages hook. This file operation ensures the timestamp field flows through to the rendering logic added in REQ-1.
